info.description: This page documents the REST APIs that perform Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager operations.
info.title: Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager API Reference

parameters.description: The Memory Exploit Mitigation policy to be created.
parameters.name: body

201.description: Web service is processed successfully and resource is created

401.description: The current logged in user does not have sufficient rights to execute the web method or user is unauthorized

404.description: The resource reguested was not found

500.description: The web service encountered an error processing the web request

post.summary: Creates a new Memory Exploit Mitigation policy. A system administrator account is required for this REST API.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the MEM policy to get.

200.description: Web service is processed successfully, result is returned

401.description: The current logged in user does not have sufficient rights to execute the web method or user is unauthorized

404.description: The resource reguested was not found

500.description: The web service encountered an error processing the web request

get.summary: Get Mem Policy payload for specified policy id. A system administrator account is required for this REST API.

parameters.description: The Memory Exploit Mitigation policy to be midified.
parameters.name: body
id
parameters.description: The ID of the MEM policy to edit.

200.description: Web service is processed successfully and policy is updated

401.description: The current logged in user does not have sufficient rights to execute the web method or user is unauthorized

404.description: The resource reguested was not found

500.description: The web service encountered an error processing the web request

put.summary: Modify existing policy values. A system administrator account is required for this REST API.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the MEM policy to delete.

204.description: Delete operation success. If the resource did not exist prior to the call, 204 is still returned.

401.description: The current logged in user does not have sufficient rights to execute the web method or user is unauthorized

404.description: The resource reguested was not found

500.description: The web service encountered an error processing the web request

delete.summary: Deletes an existing MEM policy. A system administrator account is required for this REST API.

parameters.description: The Memory Exploit Mitigation policy to be midified.
parameters.name: body
id
parameters.description: The ID of the MEM policy to update.

200.description: Web service is processed successfully and policy is updated

401.description: The current logged in user does not have sufficient rights to execute the web method or user is unauthorized

404.description: The resource reguested was not found

500.description: The web service encountered an error processing the web request

patch.summary: Update policies by patch. A system administrator account is required for this REST API.

customrules.description: Administrator defined application to protect. If an application is listed here without techniques, it is added to the coverage using the global technique state.

defaultruleoverrides.description: Overrides to the default rules. If an application is listed here without technique, it is completely disabled.

enableadvanced.description: Enables the advanced policy in addition to the basic one for Memory Exploit Mitigation.

enabled.description: Enables the basic policy for Memory Exploit Mitigation.

globalauditmodeoverride.description: Put all techniques into audit mode, even future techniques

enabled.description: Indicates whether the policy is enabled or not.

sources.description: A list of data objects provided by the policy source, which includes the ID, the name and the version.
